name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the specific problem or friction you're experiencing. -->
<!-- Example: "I have to manually run sharil curate after long sessions because..."  -->

## Which part of SHARIL does this relate to?

- [ ] Capture (how turns are saved to `raw.log`)
- [ ] Curation (how AL-FARID summarizes the board)
- [ ] Startup injection (how the board is loaded at session start)
- [ ] CLI (`sharil init` / `sharil status` / `sharil doctor`)
- [ ] Cross-chatbox sync
- [ ] Security / provenance
- [ ] Something else

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific or vague as you want — either is useful. -->
